title: How can I replace GND and VCC nodes
body:
I'd like to dump an edif file with certain elements replaced. 
mostly works. 
replacing VCC and GND with ONE and ZERO is causing me problems, tho'.
having this in a cells_map.v
does not replace them

```
module  GND (output G); ZERO _TECHMAP_REPLACE_ (.Q(G)); endmodule
module  VCC (output P); ONE _TECHMAP_REPLACE_ (.Q(P)); endmodule
```

\$VCC and \$GND doesn't work either. 

help -cells does not seem to show any constants.

more of that mess there: https://github.com/klammerj/y40k
code_blocks:
module  GND (output G); ZERO _TECHMAP_REPLACE_ (.Q(G)); endmodule
module  VCC (output P); ONE _TECHMAP_REPLACE_ (.Q(P)); endmodule
